name: Onionizer

consumes.description: Reads app.project.activeItem (must be a CompItem), comp.selectedLayers (at least one layer required), and each layer's selectedProperties. Uses PropQuery.main() to extract property paths and property objects for selected non-group properties. The active comp is also duplicated to form the CelSkin comp.

functions: guard: alert and return when no active composition is present
guard: alert and return when no layers are selected
analyse selected layers and their selected properties via PropQuery to build a property-info array
duplicate the active composition and rename the duplicate to 'CelSkin'
navigate parentProperty chain on each selected property to retarget the CelSkin duplicate
add a controller null layer named 'Onionizer' to the original composition
add seven pre-comp instances of CelSkin to the original composition, named CelSkin_1 through CelSkin_7
enable time remapping on each of the seven CelSkin layers
apply ADBE Stroke effect to each CelSkin layer
apply ADBE Fill effect to each CelSkin layer
wrap all mutations in a named undo group

scriptSim.scenario: success – single shape layer creates CelSkin + 7 instances + controller null
scriptSim.inputs: Active comp 'Walk Cycle' (1920×1080, 24 fps, 2 s) containing one selected Shape layer 'Body Shape' with its Transform/Position property selected.

operations.target: Onionizer: The Onionizer for Shape Layers
Onionizer: The Onionizer for Shape Layers

notes: Script is marked KNOWN-BLOCKED in the test harness because it //@include's 'modules/PropQuery.js' — the static include-scanner flags this and functional execution is skipped.
v2.0.1 removed the destructive placeholder expression 'expression goes here' that v2.0.0 wrote to selected properties; no expressions are written at all in the current build.
The controller null 'Onionizer' is created but no pseudo-effect parameters are added yet — this is an acknowledged prototype limitation documented in the frontmatter.
Time remapping is enabled on each CelSkin layer but time offsets are not assigned; all seven layers share the same default remap curve.
comp.duplicate() is not modelled as a harness OPERATION_KIND; the fixture documents it as context setup rather than as a captured operation.
PropQuery.main() is called with the flags ['useMatchNames'] to obtain property paths; the module must be available on the include path for real-AE execution.
